abilities.shortEffect: Raises this Pokémon's Special Attack by one stage every time its HP drops below half.
abilities.effect: Whenever this Pokémon takes damage from a move that causes its HP to drop below 50%, its Special Attack rises by one stage.

abilities.shortEffect: Absorbs Grass moves, raising Attack one stage.
abilities.effect: Whenever a Grass-type move hits this Pokémon, its Attack rises one stage, negating any other effect on it.

abilities.shortEffect: Negates all effects of weather, but does not prevent the weather itself.
abilities.effect:
While this Pokémon is in battle, weather can still be in play, but will not have any of its effects.

This ability functions identically to Air Lock.
